---
title: "Publications"
---

## First-author papers

1. **Dev, A.**, et al.  
   *The HI content of galaxy groups and its connection to dark matter haloes.*  
   MNRAS, 2023.

2. **Dev, A.**, et al.  
   *A multi-wavelength census of baryons in dark matter haloes at low redshift.*  
   2024.

3. **Dev, A.**, et al.  
   *The HI--halo mass relation from ASKAP-DINGO spectral stacking.*  
   In preparation / under revision.

## Full publication list

- [NASA ADS](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
